title: Snow, Tea and Love 2: With a Little Luck
original_title: Zăpadă, Ceai și Dragoste 2: Cu puțin noroc
overview: After being stuck in Dacia in the year 85, Snow, Tea and Love must do everything possible to return to the present and escape Emperor Nerva who wants their heads. If only they had a little luck on their side...
